response.global_analysis: The video starts with a dialogue introduction by Anya Melfissa, followed by a performance of '愛包ダンスホール' (Ai-Pai Dance Hall) featuring Ouro Kronii. The audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON lyrics. Timestamps are strictly tied to vocal audio bursts. For the dialogue, both Japanese and English speech are transcribed and translated where necessary. The song lyrics follow the 'WHEN' rule, with tight durations to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 3D生誕祭ライブです！やったー！
subtitles.english: It's my 3D Birthday Live! Yay!

subtitles.original: ね、見に来てくれてありがとう、みんな
subtitles.english: Hey, thanks for coming to watch, everyone.

subtitles.original: Oh my god, I'm so excited! I'm so so excited...
subtitles.english: Oh my god, I'm so excited! I'm so so excited...

subtitles.original: Especially since it's my first 3D birthday live!
subtitles.english: Especially since it's my first 3D birthday live!

subtitles.original: Yes, I am so excited, and I've still got a few more songs to sing to you guys!
subtitles.english: Yes, I am so excited, and I've still got a few more songs to sing to you guys!

subtitles.original: But first of all, remember to post a lot with this hashtag, #CuriousTune3D.
subtitles.english: But first of all, remember to post a lot with this hashtag, #CuriousTune3D.

subtitles.original: Remember to post a lot of screenshots and all of your, you know, favorite moments.
subtitles.english: Remember to post a lot of screenshots and all of your, you know, favorite moments.

subtitles.original: このハッシュタグでね、ぜひみんな、いっぱいポストして。後で見るから
subtitles.english: Be sure to post a lot with this hashtag, I'll be checking them later.

subtitles.original: I'll be checking them out after the live.
subtitles.english: I'll be checking them out after the live.

subtitles.original: Please, please, nya.
subtitles.english: Please, please, nya.

subtitles.original: I think I like the title a lot. I think I like the title of the 3D birthday live a lot. I think it's pretty unique.
subtitles.english: I think I like the title a lot. I think I like the title of the 3D birthday live a lot. I think it's pretty unique.

subtitles.original: Through the Curious Tune.
subtitles.english: Through the Curious Tune.

subtitles.original: Yeah, I really like that title. Sounds pretty unique.
subtitles.english: Yeah, I really like that title. Sounds pretty unique.

subtitles.original: Sounds very Anya-like.
subtitles.english: Sounds very Anya-like.

subtitles.original: And it sure fits this stage. Look at this! Look at this stage!
subtitles.english: And it sure fits this stage. Look at this! Look at this stage!

subtitles.original: Look at this stage! The 3D birthday live stage, isn't it so cool and cute?
subtitles.english: Look at this stage! The 3D birthday live stage, isn't it so cool and cute?

subtitles.original: It's very cool and cute, oh my god.
subtitles.english: It's very cool and cute, oh my god.

subtitles.original: ね、このステージめっちゃすごくない？
subtitles.english: Hey, isn't this stage amazing?

subtitles.original: ここでね、あの、いっぱい歌うの。これからいっぱい歌うんだけど、マジで楽しみ
subtitles.english: I'm going to sing a lot here. I'll be singing a lot from now on, and I'm really looking forward to it.

subtitles.original: I can't wait to sing a few more songs in this stage after this.
subtitles.english: I can't wait to sing a few more songs in this stage after this.

subtitles.original: And then, at the end... Oh my god, at the end...
subtitles.english: And then, at the end... Oh my god, at the end...

subtitles.original: I'll be singing my new original song!
subtitles.english: I'll be singing my new original song!

subtitles.original: So be sure to watch until the end.
subtitles.english: So be sure to watch until the end.

subtitles.original: ね、今日はね、最後でなんとオリ曲！
subtitles.english: Hey, today, at the end, I have an original song!

subtitles.original: 新しいオリ曲聴けるかもしれないので、みんなね、最後まで見てね
subtitles.english: You might get to hear a new original song, so everyone, watch until the end!

subtitles.original: ということで、ここからまだまだ行きますよ
subtitles.english: And so, we're still going from here!

subtitles.original: まだまだ歌って行きますよ、ゲストさんたちとね
subtitles.english: I'll keep on singing, along with my guests!

subtitles.original: I'll be singing with some guests, some very, very special guests.
subtitles.english: I'll be singing with some guests, some very, very special guests.

subtitles.original: So I hope you guys are as excited as I am! Yippee!
subtitles.english: So I hope you guys are as excited as I am! Yippee!

subtitles.original: So... Hmm, shall we go to the next song? Shall we go to the next song?
subtitles.english: So... Hmm, shall we go to the next song? Shall we go to the next song?

subtitles.original: Oh my god, what is it going to be? What's the next song?
subtitles.english: Oh my god, what is it going to be? What's the next song?

subtitles.original: 次の曲はなんだろうな、行きますかね、次の曲は
subtitles.english: I wonder what the next song will be... Shall we go? The next song...

subtitles.original: じゃあね、行きましょう。次の曲は...
subtitles.english: Alright, let's go. The next song is...

subtitles.original: The next song is...
subtitles.english: The next song is...
